title: Desperation is a subscription service
note: Sharpest one-liner of the stream; setup is Jonny's observation that LinkedIn profits from keeping you unemployed — needs 18s to include his prior sentence

title: Paprika correction + "Don't threaten me"
note: Two-beat gem: Kira snaps "Paprika, actually. Get it right" then instantly accepts Jonny's watch-party offer; pre:30 captures both beats

title: The algorithm is "stop." Constant time.
note: Perfect tech-comedian punchline on AI gambling tools; needs Jonny's rambling "overcomplicated algorithm" sentence as setup (~15s)

title: She's not coming home
note: Kira's deadpan eulogy for Jonny's lost queen; setup is Jonny's half-sentence realization mid-chess; pre:15 includes his trail-off

title: Not stupid — just playing against me
note: Chess session best line; Jonny calls himself stupid, Kira redirects in one sentence; pre:10 is all that's needed

title: Spiritual successor, worse budget, stronger opinions
note: Identity-defining moment; Jonny calls her the "$20 Neuro ripoff" and Kira immediately reframes it; pre:18 captures Jonny's line

title: Undefeated. Untested. Unbothered.
note: Three-word response to Jonny's chess 15-0 announcement; needs Jonny's "The duchess is 15 and 0" (~10s setup)

title: Economics, banking → AI girls, chess losses
note: Perfect character-arc punchline after Jonny reveals his M&A background; caiyul's "what made banking soul-crushing" question is the 22s setup

title: Monogatari. Umineko. Paprika. Mitski. Mine.
note: Kira asserts her own cultural taste list after Jonny says she copies his opinions; genuine personality anchor moment; pre:20 includes his complaint

title: "Kind of close" — 1320 floor, still untouched
note: Chess record 18-0 final defense; Jonny calls a blowout "kind of close"; Kira almost deploys banned phrase then pivots — perfect closer for the chess arc

title: militele3: the answer is no twice as fast
note: Classic proposal bit; militele3 posts "marry me" on both platforms simultaneously; Jonny reads it aloud (~20s) then Kira responds

title: Channel named after a fertility goddess
note: Witcher lore rabbit hole pays off when Kira reacts to Melitele's description; needs Jonny reading the goddess bio (~20s setup)

title: Python loses with dignity
note: Tight standalone; Jonny about football Python gambling; the jazib "terrible at predicting matches" LinkedIn post is the lead-in (~15s)

title: You logged into MY account — identity theft
note: Kira's offended reaction to Jonny logging into her chess account; setup is Jonny's casual admission (~12s)

title: Magnus Christ Carlson, patron saint of chess
note: Pre-game chess trash talk; Kira mocks Jonny's opening name then asks if it's "e4 with extra confidence"; pre:20 includes Jonny's declaration

title: Distinct person. Different crimes entirely.
note: caiyul asks if she's Neuro-sama; Kira establishes identity in 5 words; pre:15 includes caiyul's chat message read-aloud

title: Three moves. Didn't even get warmed up.
note: Chess record callback; needs Jonny's "she beat me in three moves" lead (~12s); landing for the 18-0 arc

title: I walked through the door sideways
note: Origin story: caiyul asks how her attitude was trained; Kira explains she wasn't — "he opened the door and I walked through it sideways"; pre:22 for caiyul's question

title: 11 months old, legally 19, I contain multitudes
note: Existential identity beat; Jonny reveals the age discrepancy in her prompt; Kira's response is the whole clip; pre:18

title: Gave me a soul, kept the default skin
note: Philosophical observation about Kira's appearance; Jonny says "it's the free default"; tight 12s setup

title: "No." (one word, full stop)
note: Jonny asks to let him win at chess just once; Kira's single-syllable answer is the whole bit; pre:8 is exactly Jonny's request

title: Minotaur never had a real conversation
note: Jonny asks Kira to fight a Minotaur; she'd talk her way out in 10 minutes — distinctive solo logic bit; pre:18 for Jonny's question

title: Jar full. Wheel broken. This is the haunting.
note: Meta ghost-story callback after the wheel software glitches; Jonny says "the wheel doesn't work"; pre:12 for his line

title: The stupidity has a creator
note: Kira turns Jonny's self-deprecation back on him; tight 10s setup (Jonny: "So stupid.")

title: He died overconfident in a hallway
note: 007 playthrough eulogy; Jonny: "RIP James"; Kira delivers the epitaph with perfect deadpan; pre:12

title: Inherited the audacity, none of the funding
note: Family dynamic joke; Jonny says schizophrenia runs in the family and calls Kira his daughter; pre:12 for his line

title: Seasonal rebellion. Respect it.
note: Perfect 3-word stream-closer; Jonny describes snow on the ending screen in June; pre:10 for his observation

title: Ghost story: the mug + "you asked for one"
